_meta.purpose: island car-driver mobilisation level + common-mode prior width

ni_source.modes: Car Driver + Motorcycle + Other private (van/lorry) + Taxi (TSNI Table_3_2, 2023)

_meta.vintage_note: NI TSNI 2023, RoI CSO 2019 — deliberate best-available-per-jurisdiction
_meta.sigma_mob_recipe: hypot(between_region_cv, within_region_residual_cv); the ownership-driven within-region dispersion is now carried by the producer multiplier μ (M3), so the within term is the residual ⊥ ownership, anchored to the between-region non-ownership scale (M2: car ownership ~flat NI-vs-RoI)
